description_long: This chaise features a modern, minimalist design with a gently reclined backrest and a wide, cushioned seat upholstered in a vibrant blue fabric. The backrest and seat are visually segmented into three horizontal padded sections, providing both comfort and a contemporary aesthetic. The frame is constructed from a warm-toned wood, forming an elegant X-shaped base that supports the seat and backrest. The underside of the seat and backrest is finished in a contrasting yellow, adding a subtle accent visible from the rear and sides. The chaise lacks armrests, emphasizing its open and inviting form, and the overall silhouette is sleek with soft, rounded edges. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern blue chaise with a segmented, padded seat and backrest, supported by a wooden X-shaped frame and accented with yellow on the underside. The design is sleek, armless, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, blue cushioned seat and backrest with three horizontal segments and the wooden legs extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the reclined angle of the backrest, the thick padding, and the X-shaped wooden frame supporting the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the yellow underside of the seat and backrest, as well as the full curvature and structure of the wooden frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the reclined profile, showing the blue upholstery, yellow accent, and the elegant wooden base.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall and gently reclined, segmented into three horizontal padded sections for ergonomic support. It has a smooth, continuous surface with no visible decorative elements or tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the chaise has an open design on both sides.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are part of an X-shaped wooden frame, slightly curved and finished in a natural brown tone, providing both stability and a modern aesthetic.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid blue with visible horizontal segmentation, giving a quilted appearance but without any decorative patterns or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: The chaise features integrated cushions forming the seat and backrest, segmented into three horizontal sections, all attached and forming a continuous padded surface.
